description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and gable roof combination, featuring extensive use of wood and glass on its facade. The front of the house includes a covered driveway and garage, with a paved entryway leading to the main entrance. Large windows span both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear and side elevations reveal a spacious green lawn, with the back of the house showcasing a series of vertical wooden slats and a balcony or terrace area. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a mix of grass, concrete, and stone surfaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of wood, glass, and concrete, featuring large windows, a covered garage, and a spacious green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered driveway, garage, and a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, garage extension, and the mix of green lawn and paved surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive lawn, large windows, and a balcony or terrace with vertical wooden slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the wooden slat design, terrace, and the full extent of the green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, paved steps, and a modern door integrated into the facade, adjacent to a garage entrance.
